plugin.name: Aardwolf_Item_Database
plugin.author: Dunnaakr
plugin.purpose: Builds a searchable item database from loot sources and identify output.

muclient.triggers:
<trigger name="idb_loot_item" enabled="y" regexp="y" sequence="101" match="^You get (?
.+) from the .* corpse of (?.+)\.$" send_to="12" script="idb_track_item" />
muclient.script:
require "serialize" require "gmcphelper" require "wrapped_captures"
local DB_FILE_NAME = "item_database.lua" local SUMMARY_FILE_NAME = "item_database_summary.txt" local REPORT_FILE_NAME = "item_database_report.txt" local IDENTIFY_DELAY = 0.2
local BLOOT_PREFIXES = { polished = true, enhanced = true, burnished = true, shiny = true, vibrant = true, sparkling = true, gleaming = true, shimmering = true, dazzling = true, brilliant = true, radiant = true, wondrous = true, majestic = true, exalted = true, eternal = true, legendary = true, epic = true, mythical = true, fabled = true, divine = true, godly = true, }
local STAT_ALIASES = { dam = "Average Dam", avgdam = "Average Dam", averagedam = "Average Dam", averagedamage = "Average Dam", damage = "Average Dam", avg = "Average Dam", hr = "Hit roll", hitroll = "Hit roll", dr = "Damage roll", damroll = "Damage roll", damageroll = "Damage roll", hp = "Hit points", hitpoint = "Hit points", hitpoints = "Hit points", mana = "Mana", move = "Moves", moves = "Moves", str = "Strength", strength = "Strength", dex = "Dexterity", dexterity = "Dexterity", con = "Constitution", constitution = "Constitution", int = "Intelligence", intelligence = "Intelligence", wis = "Wisdom", wisdom = "Wisdom", luc = "Luck", luck = "Luck", score = "Score", weight = "Weight", worth = "Worth", }
local idb = { db = nil, player_name = "", pending_save_scheduled = false, search_cache = { groups = {}, stat_results = {}, highest_results = {}, }, capture = { active = false, queue = {}, index = 0, started_at = nil, session_added = 0, session_updated = 0, session_failed = 0, recent_only = true, }, }
local function trim(s) s = tostring(s or "") s = s:gsub("^%s+", "") s = s:gsub("%s+$", "") return s end
local function collapse_spaces(s) return trim((s or ""):gsub("%s+", " ")) end
local function safe_tonumber(value) if value == nil then return nil end value = tostring(value):gsub(",", "") return tonumber(value) end
local function current_timestamp() return os.date("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") end
local function get_plugin_directory() return GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 20) end
local function get_db_path() return get_plugin_directory() .. DB_FILE_NAME end
local function get_summary_path() return get_plugin_directory() .. SUMMARY_FILE_NAME end
local function get_report_path() return get_plugin_directory() .. REPORT_FILE_NAME end
local function get_current_area() local area = gmcp("room.info.zone") or gmcp("room.info.area") or "" return trim(area) end
local function refresh_player_name() local gmcp_name = trim(gmcp("char.base.name") or "") if gmcp_name ~= "" then idb.player_name = gmcp_name SetVariable("player_name", gmcp_name) return gmcp_name end
local saved_name = trim(GetVariable("player_name") or "") if saved_name ~= "" then idb.player_name = saved_name end
return idb.player_name or "" end
local function get_player_name() return refresh_player_name() end
local function normalize_item_name(name) name = trim(name) name = name:gsub("|%[", "") name = name:gsub("%]|", "") name = collapse_spaces(name) return string.lower(name) end
local function normalize_token(value) return normalize_item_name(value):gsub("%s+", "") end
local function split_bloot_name(name) name = trim(name) local prefix, rest = name:match("^%(([%a]+)%)%s+(.+)$") if prefix and BLOOT_PREFIXES[string.lower(prefix)] then return prefix, trim(rest) end return nil, name end
local function clean_inventory_name(name) name = trim(name) while name:match("^%(%s*%d+%)") do name = name:gsub("^%(%s*%d+%)", "") name = trim(name) end while name:match("^%([A-Z]%)") do name = name:gsub("^%([A-Z]%)", "") name = trim(name) end return collapse_spaces(name) end
local function styles_line_to_text(style_line) local parts = {} for _, part in ipairs(style_line or {}) do table.insert(parts, part.text or "") end return table.concat(parts) end
local function capture_lines_to_text(captured_styles) local lines = {} for _, line_styles in ipairs(captured_styles or {}) do table.insert(lines, styles_line_to_text(line_styles)) end return lines end
local function clone_style_lines(captured_styles) local cloned = {} for i, line_styles in ipairs(captured_styles or {}) do cloned[i] = {} for j, part in ipairs(line_styles or {}) do cloned[i][j] = { text = part.text or "", length = part.length, textcolour = part.textcolour, backcolour = part.backcolour, style = part.style, } end end return cloned end
local function notify(msg) ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "[IDB] " .. msg) end
local function warn(msg) ColourNote("white", "red", "[IDB] " .. msg) end
local function ensure_db() if idb.db then return end
idb.db = { meta = { created_at = current_timestamp(), updated_at = current_timestamp(), capture_runs = 0, total_records = 0, total_sources = 0, total_identifies = 0, total_loot_sightings = 0, }, next_record_id = 1, records = {}, by_fingerprint = {}, pending_sources = {}, } end
local function normalize_record_fields(record) record.sources = record.sources or {} record.identify_fields = record.identify_fields or {} record.identify_styles = record.identify_styles or {} record.identify_raw = record.identify_raw or "" record.added_by = record.added_by or "" local prefix, base_name = split_bloot_name(record.name or "") record.base_name = record.base_name or base_name or (record.name or "") record.bloot_prefix = record.bloot_prefix or prefix record.is_bloot = record.is_bloot or (record.bloot_prefix ~= nil) end
local function load_db() ensure_db()
local db_path = get_db_path() local chunk, err = loadfile(db_path) if not chunk then return false, err end
local ok, loaded = pcall(chunk) if not ok or type(loaded) ~= "table" then return false, loaded end
idb.db = loaded idb.db.meta = idb.db.meta or {} idb.db.records = idb.db.records or {} idb.db.by_fingerprint = idb.db.by_fingerprint or {} idb.db.pending_sources = idb.db.pending_sources or {} idb.db.next_record_id = tonumber(idb.db.next_record_id) or 1 idb.db.meta.capture_runs = tonumber(idb.db.meta.capture_runs) or 0 idb.db.meta.total_records = tonumber(idb.db.meta.total_records) or 0 idb.db.meta.total_sources = tonumber(idb.db.meta.total_sources) or 0 idb.db.meta.total_identifies = tonumber(idb.db.meta.total_identifies) or 0 idb.db.meta.total_loot_sightings = tonumber(idb.db.meta.total_loot_sightings) or 0
for _, record in pairs(idb.db.records) do normalize_record_fields(record) end
return true end
local function serialize_lua(value, indent) indent = indent or 0 local pad = string.rep(" ", indent) local next_pad = string.rep(" ", indent + 1) local t = type(value)
if t == "nil" then return "nil" elseif t == "number" or t == "boolean" then return tostring(value) elseif t == "string" then return string.format("%q", value) elseif t ~= "table" then return string.format("%q", tostring(value)) end
local keys = {} for k in pairs(value) do table.insert(keys, k) end
table.sort(keys, function(a, b) if type(a) == type(b) then return tostring(a) < tostring(b) end return type(a) < type(b) end)
local is_array = true for i, k in ipairs(keys) do if k ~= i then is_array = false break end end
local lines = {"{"} for _, key in ipairs(keys) do local encoded_value = serialize_lua(value[key], indent + 1) if is_array then table.insert(lines, next_pad .. encoded_value .. ",") else local encoded_key if type(key) == "string" and key:match("^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$") then encoded_key = key else encoded_key = "[" .. serialize_lua(key, 0) .. "]" end table.insert(lines, next_pad .. encoded_key .. " = " .. encoded_value .. ",") end end table.insert(lines, pad .. "}") return table.concat(lines, "\n") end
local function write_text_file(path, text) local file, err = io.open(path, "w") if not file then return false, err end file:write(text) file:close() return true end
local function pending_source_count() ensure_db() local count = 0 for _, queue in pairs(idb.db.pending_sources or {}) do count = count + #queue end return count end
local function build_pending_target_counts() ensure_db() local counts = {} for key, queue in pairs(idb.db.pending_sources or {}) do if queue and #queue > 0 then counts[key] = #queue end end return counts end
local function backfill_missing_added_by() local player_name = refresh_player_name() if player_name == "" then return false end
local changed = false for _, record in pairs(idb.db.records or {}) do normalize_record_fields(record) if trim(record.added_by or "") == "" then record.added_by = player_name changed = true end end
return changed end
local function write_summary_files() ensure_db()
local summary_lines = { "Aardwolf Item Database Summary", "Generated: " .. current_timestamp(), "", "Record ID | Name | Level | Type | Wearable | Found At | Drop Mob | Drop Area | Added By", string.rep("-", 128), }
local records = {} for _, record in pairs(idb.db.records) do normalize_record_fields(record) table.insert(records, record) end table.sort(records, function(a, b) if normalize_item_name(a.base_name or a.name or "") == normalize_item_name(b.base_name or b.name or "") then return tonumber(a.level or 0) < tonumber(b.level or 0) end return normalize_item_name(a.base_name or a.name or "") < normalize_item_name(b.base_name or b.name or "") end)
local total_sources = 0 for _, record in ipairs(records) do if #record.sources == 0 then table.insert(summary_lines, string.format( "%s | %s | %s | %s | %s | %s | %s | %s | %s", tostring(record.record_id or ""), record.name or "", record.level or "", record.item_type or "", record.wearable or "", record.found_at or "", "", "", record.added_by or "" )) else for _, source in ipairs(record.sources) do total_sources = total_sources + 1 table.insert(summary_lines, string.format( "%s | %s | %s | %s | %s | %s | %s | %s | %s", tostring(record.record_id or ""), record.name or "", record.level or "", record.item_type or "", record.wearable or "", record.found_at or "", source.mob or "", source.area or "", record.added_by or "" )) end end end
local report_lines = { "Aardwolf Item Database Report", "Generated: " .. current_timestamp(), "", "Capture runs: " .. tostring(idb.db.meta.capture_runs or 0), "Unique records: " .. tostring(#records), "Total source sightings: " .. tostring(total_sources), "Pending loot entries: " .. tostring(pending_source_count()), "Total identify captures: " .. tostring(idb.db.meta.total_identifies or 0), "Database file: " .. get_db_path(), "Summary file: " .. get_summary_path(), }
write_text_file(get_summary_path(), table.concat(summary_lines, "\n")) write_text_file(get_report_path(), table.concat(report_lines, "\n")) end
local function save_db(write_summaries) ensure_db() idb.db.meta.updated_at = current_timestamp() local serialized = "return " .. serialize_lua(idb.db, 0) .. "\n" local ok, err = write_text_file(get_db_path(), serialized) if not ok then warn("Failed to write database file: " .. tostring(err)) return false end if write_summaries ~= false then write_summary_files() end return true end
function idb_flush_scheduled_save() idb.pending_save_scheduled = false save_db(false) end
local function schedule_db_save() if idb.pending_save_scheduled then return end
idb.pending_save_scheduled = true DoAfterSpecial(2, "idb_flush_scheduled_save()", sendto.script) end
local function add_loot_source(item_name, source) ensure_db() local key = normalize_item_name(item_name) idb.db.pending_sources[key] = idb.db.pending_sources[key] or {} table.insert(idb.db.pending_sources[key], source) idb.db.meta.total_loot_sightings = (idb.db.meta.total_loot_sightings or 0) + 1 end
local function consume_loot_source(name_a, name_b) ensure_db() local candidates = {name_a, name_b} for _, candidate in ipairs(candidates) do local key = normalize_item_name(candidate or "") local queue = idb.db.pending_sources[key] if queue and #queue > 0 then return table.remove(queue, 1) end end return nil end
local function fingerprint_for(item) return table.concat({ normalize_item_name(item.name or ""), trim(item.level or ""), trim(item.item_type or ""), trim(item.wearable or ""), trim(item.found_at or ""), trim(item.identify_raw or ""), }, "|") end
local function find_source(record, source) for _, existing in ipairs(record.sources or {}) do if (existing.mob or "") == (source.mob or "") and (existing.area or "") == (source.area or "") then return existing end end return nil end
local function add_or_update_record(item, source) ensure_db()
local fingerprint = fingerprint_for(item) local record_id = idb.db.by_fingerprint[fingerprint] local is_new = false local record
if record_id and idb.db.records[record_id] then record = idb.db.records[record_id] else is_new = true record = { record_id = idb.db.next_record_id, fingerprint = fingerprint, name = item.name or "", base_name = item.base_name or item.name or "", bloot_prefix = item.bloot_prefix, is_bloot = item.is_bloot or false, item_type = item.item_type or "", level = item.level or "", identify_id = item.identify_id or "", keywords = item.keywords or "", flags = item.flags or "", found_at = item.found_at or "", wearable = item.wearable or "", identify_fields = item.fields or {}, identify_raw = item.identify_raw or "", identify_styles = item.identify_styles or {}, first_seen_at = current_timestamp(), last_seen_at = current_timestamp(), seen_count = 0, sources = {}, added_by = item.added_by or "", } idb.db.records[record.record_id] = record idb.db.by_fingerprint[fingerprint] = record.record_id idb.db.next_record_id = record.record_id + 1 idb.db.meta.total_records = (idb.db.meta.total_records or 0) + 1 end
normalize_record_fields(record) record.last_seen_at = current_timestamp() record.seen_count = (record.seen_count or 0) + 1 record.identify_fields = item.fields or record.identify_fields record.identify_raw = item.identify_raw or record.identify_raw record.identify_styles = item.identify_styles or record.identify_styles record.identify_id = item.identify_id or record.identify_id record.keywords = item.keywords or record.keywords record.flags = item.flags or record.flags record.found_at = item.found_at or record.found_at record.wearable = item.wearable or record.wearable record.level = item.level or record.level record.item_type = item.item_type or record.item_type record.name = item.name or record.name record.base_name = item.base_name or record.base_name record.bloot_prefix = item.bloot_prefix or record.bloot_prefix record.is_bloot = item.is_bloot or record.is_bloot if trim(record.added_by or "") == "" then record.added_by = item.added_by or "" end
if source then local existing_source = find_source(record, source) if existing_source then existing_source.count = (existing_source.count or 1) + 1 existing_source.last_seen_at = current_timestamp() else source.count = 1 source.first_seen_at = current_timestamp() source.last_seen_at = current_timestamp() table.insert(record.sources, source) idb.db.meta.total_sources = (idb.db.meta.total_sources or 0) + 1 end end
return record, is_new end
local function record_unique_signature(record) return table.concat({ normalize_item_name(record.name or ""), trim(record.level or ""), trim(record.item_type or ""), trim(record.wearable or ""), trim(record.identify_raw or ""), }, "|") end
local function dedupe_records(records) local deduped = {} local seen = {} for _, record in ipairs(records or {}) do local signature = record_unique_signature(record) if not seen[signature] then seen[signature] = true table.insert(deduped, record) end end return deduped end
local function parse_inventory_serial_line(line) local name, serials, level = line:match("^%s*(.-)%s+%[([%d,]+)%]%s+%((%d+)%)%s*$") if not name or not serials then return nil end
name = clean_inventory_name(name) if name == "" then return nil end
local entries = {} for serial in tostring(serials):gmatch("%d+") do table.insert(entries, { display_name = name, serial = serial, level = level, }) end
if #entries == 0 then return nil end
return entries end
local function parse_identify_block(lines) local item = { fields = {}, raw_lines = {}, identify_raw = "", name = "", base_name = "", bloot_prefix = nil, is_bloot = false, item_type = "", level = "", identify_id = "", keywords = "", flags = "", found_at = "", wearable = "", }
local current_key = nil
local function append_field(key, value) key = trim(key) value = trim(value) if key == "" then return end
if item.fields[key] and item.fields[key] ~= "" then item.fields[key] = item.fields[key] .. " " .. value else item.fields[key] = value end current_key = key end
local function parse_single(inner) local key, value = inner:match("^%s*([^:]-)%s*:%s*(.-)%s*$") key = trim(key) value = trim(value) if key == "" then return false end append_field(key, value) return true end
for _, line_text in ipairs(lines or {}) do if line_text:match("^%+") or line_text:match("^|") then table.insert(item.raw_lines, line_text) end
if line_text:match("^|") then local inner = line_text:gsub("^|", ""):gsub("|%s*$", "") if not inner:match("^%s*$") then local right_half = inner:sub(34) if right_half:match("%S.-:%s*") then local left = trim(inner:sub(1, 33)) local right = trim(right_half) local left_ok = parse_single(left) local right_ok = parse_single(right) if not left_ok and not right_ok then local continuation = inner:match("^%s*:%s*(.-)%s*$") if continuation and current_key then append_field(current_key, continuation) end end else local ok = parse_single(inner) if not ok then local continuation = inner:match("^%s*:%s*(.-)%s*$") if continuation and current_key then append_field(current_key, continuation) end end end end end end
item.identify_raw = table.concat(item.raw_lines, "\n") item.name = item.fields["Name"] or "" item.item_type = item.fields["Type"] or "" item.level = item.fields["Level"] or "" item.identify_id = item.fields["Id"] or "" item.keywords = item.fields["Keywords"] or "" item.flags = item.fields["Flags"] or "" item.found_at = item.fields["Found at"] or "" item.wearable = item.fields["Wearable"] or ""
local prefix, base_name = split_bloot_name(item.name) item.bloot_prefix = prefix item.base_name = base_name or item.name item.is_bloot = prefix ~= nil
if item.name == "" and item.identify_raw == "" then return nil end
return item end
local function rgb_name(value, fallback) if type(value) == "number" then return RGBColourToName(value) end if type(value) == "string" and value ~= "" then return value end return fallback or "white" end
local function replay_style_line(style_line) for _, part in ipairs(style_line or {}) do ColourTell( rgb_name(part.textcolour, "white"), rgb_name(part.backcolour, "black"), part.text or "" ) end Note("") end
local function sort_records_for_variants(records) table.sort(records, function(a, b) local a_level = tonumber(a.level or 0) or 0 local b_level = tonumber(b.level or 0) or 0 if a_level == b_level then return normalize_item_name(a.name or "") < normalize_item_name(b.name or "") end return a_level < b_level end) end
local function record_matches_type_or_wearable(record, search_term) local normalized_term = normalize_item_name(search_term) local item_type = normalize_item_name(record.item_type or "") local wearable = normalize_item_name(record.wearable or "") if item_type:find(normalized_term, 1, true) then return true end if wearable:find(normalized_term, 1, true) then return true end return false end
local function build_name_groups(query, bloot_only) ensure_db() local normalized_query = normalize_item_name(query) local grouped = {}
for _, record in pairs(idb.db.records) do normalize_record_fields(record) if (not bloot_only or record.is_bloot) then local search_haystack = string.lower(table.concat({ record.base_name or "", record.name or "", }, " "))
if search_haystack:find(normalized_query, 1, true) then local key = normalize_item_name(record.base_name or record.name or "") grouped[key] = grouped[key] or { base_name = record.base_name or record.name or "", records = {}, } table.insert(grouped[key].records, record) end end end
local results = {} for key, group in pairs(grouped) do group.records = dedupe_records(group.records) sort_records_for_variants(group.records) group.key = key table.insert(results, group) end
table.sort(results, function(a, b) return normalize_item_name(a.base_name or "") < normalize_item_name(b.base_name or "") end)
return results end
local function search_records_by_stats(item_type, min_level, max_level) ensure_db() local matches = {}
for _, record in pairs(idb.db.records) do normalize_record_fields(record) local level = tonumber(record.level or 0) if level and level >= min_level and level <= max_level and record_matches_type_or_wearable(record, item_type) then table.insert(matches, record) end end
matches = dedupe_records(matches) sort_records_for_variants(matches) return matches end
local function resolve_stat_alias(stat_name) local norm = normalize_token(stat_name) return STAT_ALIASES[norm] end
local function get_record_stat_value(record, stat_name) local wanted_alias = resolve_stat_alias(stat_name) local wanted_norm = normalize_item_name(stat_name) local wanted_token = normalize_token(stat_name) local alias_norm = wanted_alias and normalize_item_name(wanted_alias) or nil local alias_token = wanted_alias and normalize_token(wanted_alias) or nil
for key, value in pairs(record.identify_fields or {}) do local key_norm = normalize_item_name(key) local key_token = normalize_token(key) local matches = false
if alias_norm and (key_norm == alias_norm or key_token == alias_token) then matches = true elseif key_norm == wanted_norm or key_token == wanted_token then matches = true elseif key_norm:find(wanted_norm, 1, true) then matches = true end
if matches then local number_text = tostring(value or ""):match("[%+%-]?[%d,]+") local number_value = safe_tonumber(number_text) if number_value ~= nil then return number_value, key end end end
return nil, nil end
local function dedupe_highest_results(results) local deduped = {} local seen = {} for _, result in ipairs(results or {}) do local key = table.concat({ normalize_item_name(result.record.name or ""), tostring(result.stat_value or ""), }, "|") if not seen[key] then seen[key] = true table.insert(deduped, result) end end return deduped end
local function search_highest_stat(stat_name, item_type, min_level, max_level) local results = {} local records = search_records_by_stats(item_type, min_level, max_level) for _, record in ipairs(records) do local stat_value, matched_key = get_record_stat_value(record, stat_name) if stat_value ~= nil then table.insert(results, { record = record, stat_value = stat_value, stat_key = matched_key or stat_name, }) end end
table.sort(results, function(a, b) if a.stat_value == b.stat_value then local a_level = tonumber(a.record.level or 0) or 0 local b_level = tonumber(b.record.level or 0) or 0 if a_level == b_level then return normalize_item_name(a.record.name or "") < normalize_item_name(b.record.name or "") end return a_level < b_level end return a.stat_value > b.stat_value end)
return dedupe_highest_results(results) end
function idb_show_record(record_id) ensure_db() local record = idb.db.records[tonumber(record_id or 0)] if not record then warn("Record not found: " .. tostring(record_id)) return end
normalize_record_fields(record)
ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "") ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "[IDB] Record #" .. tostring(record.record_id)) ColourNote("white", "", "Variant : " .. (record.name or "")) ColourNote("white", "", "Level : " .. (record.level or "")) ColourNote("white", "", "Type : " .. (record.item_type or "")) ColourNote("white", "", "Wearable : " .. (record.wearable or "")) ColourNote("white", "", "Found at : " .. (record.found_at or "")) ColourNote("white", "", "Keywords : " .. (record.keywords or "")) ColourNote("white", "", "Flags : " .. (record.flags or "")) ColourNote("white", "", "Seen count: " .. tostring(record.seen_count or 0))
if record.sources and #record.sources > 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", "Sources:") for _, source in ipairs(record.sources) do ColourNote("white", "", string.format( " %s | %s | seen %s time(s)", source.mob or "Unknown mob", source.area or "Unknown area", tostring(source.count or 1) )) end end
if record.identify_styles and #record.identify_styles > 0 then ColourNote("yellow", "", "Identify:") for _, style_line in ipairs(record.identify_styles) do replay_style_line(style_line) end elseif record.identify_raw and record.identify_raw ~= "" then ColourNote("yellow", "", "Identify:") for line_text in record.identify_raw:gmatch("[^\r\n]+") do Note(line_text) end end
ColourNote("white", "", "Added by: " .. (record.added_by or "")) end
function idb_show_cached_group(index) local group = idb.search_cache.groups[tonumber(index or 0)] if not group then warn("Search group not found.") return end
ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "") ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "[IDB] Variants for " .. (group.base_name or "item"))
local records = dedupe_records(group.records or {}) sort_records_for_variants(records)
for _, record in ipairs(records) do local label = string.format("%s [lvl %s] - %s", record.name or "", record.level or "?", record.item_type or "?") Hyperlink( "!!" .. GetPluginID() .. ":idb_show_record(" .. tostring(record.record_id) .. ")", label, "Show full item information", "cyan", 0, false ) Simulate("\r") end end
local function show_grouped_name_results(query, bloot_only) local groups = build_name_groups(query, bloot_only) if #groups == 0 then notify("No matching items found for '" .. query .. "'.") return end
idb.search_cache.groups = groups notify(string.format( "Found %d unique item match(es) for '%s'%s:", #groups, query, bloot_only and " [bloot only]" or "" ))
for i, group in ipairs(groups) do local count_text = tostring(#(group.records or {})) .. " variant(s)" Hyperlink( "!!" .. GetPluginID() .. ":idb_show_cached_group(" .. tostring(i) .. ")", string.format("%s [%s]", group.base_name or "item", count_text), "Click to see all level variants", "cyan", 0, false ) Simulate("\r") end end
local function show_stat_search_results(item_type, min_level, max_level) local records = search_records_by_stats(item_type, min_level, max_level) if #records == 0 then notify(string.format( "No items found for type/location '%s' in level range %d-%d.", item_type, min_level, max_level )) return end
idb.search_cache.stat_results = records notify(string.format( "Found %d matching item variant(s) for type/location '%s' in level range %d-%d:", #records, item_type, min_level, max_level ))
for _, record in ipairs(records) do local label = string.format("%s [lvl %s] - %s / %s", record.name or "", record.level or "?", record.item_type or "?", record.wearable or "?") Hyperlink( "!!" .. GetPluginID() .. ":idb_show_record(" .. tostring(record.record_id) .. ")", label, "Show full item information", "cyan", 0, false ) Simulate("\r") end end
local function show_highest_search_results(stat_name, item_type, min_level, max_level) local results = search_highest_stat(stat_name, item_type, min_level, max_level) if #results == 0 then notify(string.format( "No items found for highest '%s' in type/location '%s' level range %d-%d.", stat_name, item_type, min_level, max_level )) return end
idb.search_cache.highest_results = results notify(string.format( "Highest '%s' results for type/location '%s' in level range %d-%d:", stat_name, item_type, min_level, max_level ))
for _, result in ipairs(results) do local record = result.record local label = string.format( "%s [%s %s] [lvl %s] - %s / %s", record.name or "", result.stat_key or stat_name, tostring(result.stat_value), record.level or "?", record.item_type or "?", record.wearable or "?" ) Hyperlink( "!!" .. GetPluginID() .. ":idb_show_record(" .. tostring(record.record_id) .. ")", label, "Show full item information", "cyan", 0, false ) Simulate("\r") end end
function idb_continue_capture() if idb.capture and idb.capture.active then capture_next_identify() end end
function finish_capture() local capture = idb.capture capture.active = false ensure_db() idb.db.meta.capture_runs = (idb.db.meta.capture_runs or 0) + 1 save_db()
notify(string.format( "Capture complete. Added %d new records, updated %d existing records, failed %d item(s).", capture.session_added or 0, capture.session_updated or 0, capture.session_failed or 0 )) end
function capture_next_identify() local capture = idb.capture capture.index = capture.index + 1
if capture.index > #capture.queue then finish_capture() return end
local entry = capture.queue[capture.index] notify(string.format("Identifying %d/%d: %s [%s]", capture.index, #capture.queue, entry.display_name, entry.serial))
Capture.untagged_output( "identify " .. entry.serial, true, true, false, function(captured_styles, start_line, end_line) local lines = capture_lines_to_text(captured_styles) local item = parse_identify_block(lines) if not item then capture.session_failed = (capture.session_failed or 0) + 1 else item.identify_styles = clone_style_lines(captured_styles) item.added_by = get_player_name() local source = consume_loot_source(entry.display_name, item.name) local record, is_new = add_or_update_record(item, source) idb.db.meta.total_identifies = (idb.db.meta.total_identifies or 0) + 1 if is_new then capture.session_added = (capture.session_added or 0) + 1 else capture.session_updated = (capture.session_updated or 0) + 1 end end DoAfterSpecial(IDENTIFY_DELAY, "idb_continue_capture()", sendto.script) end, nil, function() warn("Identify timed out for serial " .. tostring(entry.serial)) capture.session_failed = (capture.session_failed or 0) + 1 DoAfterSpecial(IDENTIFY_DELAY, "idb_continue_capture()", sendto.script) end, 30 ) end
local function begin_identify_capture(serial_entries, recent_only) idb.capture = { active = true, queue = serial_entries, index = 0, started_at = current_timestamp(), session_added = 0, session_updated = 0, session_failed = 0, recent_only = recent_only, }
if #serial_entries == 0 then if recent_only then warn("No recently looted items were found to identify.") else warn("No inventory items were found to identify.") end idb.capture.active = false return end
notify(string.format( "Inventory capture found %d item(s). Starting identify pass%s.", #serial_entries, recent_only and " for recent loot only" or "" )) capture_next_identify() end
local function parse_inventory_capture(lines, recent_only) local entries = {} local seen_serials = {} local target_counts = recent_only and build_pending_target_counts() or nil
for _, line_text in ipairs(lines or {}) do local parsed_entries = parse_inventory_serial_line(line_text) if parsed_entries then for _, parsed in ipairs(parsed_entries) do if not seen_serials[parsed.serial] then local include_entry = true if recent_only then local key = normalize_item_name(parsed.display_name) local remaining = target_counts[key] or 0 include_entry = remaining > 0 if include_entry then target_counts[key] = remaining - 1 end end
if include_entry then seen_serials[parsed.serial] = true table.insert(entries, parsed) end end end end end
return entries end
local function start_capture(recent_only) if idb.capture.active then warn("A capture is already running.") return end
if recent_only and pending_source_count() == 0 then warn("No recently looted items are waiting to be identified.") return end
notify(recent_only and "Starting capture from inventory serials for recent loot only..." or "Starting capture from inventory serials for all inventory items...")
Capture.untagged_output( "inventory serials", true, true, false, function(captured_styles, start_line, end_line) local lines = capture_lines_to_text(captured_styles) local entries = parse_inventory_capture(lines, recent_only) begin_identify_capture(entries, recent_only) end, true, function() warn("Timed out while capturing inventory serials.") end, 30 ) end
local function show_report() ensure_db() local total_records = 0 for _ in pairs(idb.db.records) do total_records = total_records + 1 end
notify("Capture runs: " .. tostring(idb.db.meta.capture_runs or 0)) notify("Database started: " .. tostring(idb.db.meta.created_at or "")) notify("Known player: " .. (get_player_name() ~= "" and get_player_name() or "[unknown]")) notify("Unique records: " .. tostring(total_records) .. " | Source sightings: " .. tostring(idb.db.meta.total_sources or 0) .. " | Identify captures: " .. tostring(idb.db.meta.total_identifies or 0)) notify("Pending loot: " .. tostring(pending_source_count()) .. " | Total loot sightings: " .. tostring(idb.db.meta.total_loot_sightings or 0)) notify("Database: " .. get_db_path()) notify("Summary : " .. get_summary_path()) end
local function show_help() ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "") ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "Aardwolf Item Database commands") ColourNote("yellow", "", " idb capture") ColourNote("white", "", " Run inventory serials and identify only recently looted items waiting in the pending list.") ColourNote("yellow", "", " idb capture all") ColourNote("white", "", " Run inventory serials and identify every item in your inventory.") ColourNote("yellow", "", " idb report") ColourNote("white", "", " Show database totals and file locations.") ColourNote("yellow", "", " idb reload") ColourNote("white", "", " Refresh the player name cache, backfill missing Added by values, and reload the plugin.") ColourNote("yellow", "", " idb <item name>") ColourNote("white", "", " Search by item name only and return unique base items. Click one to view all level variants.") ColourNote("yellow", "", " idb <item name> bloot") ColourNote("white", "", " Search by item name, but only for bonusloot variants.") ColourNote("yellow", "", " idb search <type/location> <min level> <max level>") ColourNote("white", "", " Search by item type or wearable location and level range.") ColourNote("yellow", "", " idb highest <stat> <type/location> <min level> <max level>") ColourNote("white", "", " Search by highest stat value within the requested type/location and level range.") ColourNote("paleturquoise", "", "") end
local function is_player_corpse_name(mob) local player_name = normalize_item_name(get_player_name()) local mob_name = normalize_item_name(mob) if player_name == "" or mob_name == "" then return false end
if mob_name == player_name then return true end
if mob_name:find(player_name, 1, true) then return true end
return false end
function idb_track_item(name, line, wildcards) local item_name = collapse_spaces(wildcards.item or "") local mob = trim(wildcards.mob or "") if item_name == "" or mob == "" then return end
if is_player_corpse_name(mob) then return end
add_loot_source(item_name, { mob = mob, area = get_current_area(), looted_at = current_timestamp(), }) schedule_db_save() end
function idb_post_reload_notice() local message = trim(GetVariable("reload_notice") or "") if message ~= "" then SetVariable("reload_notice", "") notify(message) end end
local function do_reload() refresh_player_name() local did_backfill = backfill_missing_added_by() save_db() local message = "Reload complete. Player name cached as " .. (get_player_name() ~= "" and get_player_name() or "[unknown]") .. "." if did_backfill then message = message .. " Backfilled missing Added by values." end SetVariable("reload_notice", message) ReloadPlugin(GetPluginID()) end
function idb_command(name, line, wildcards) local args = trim((line or ""):gsub("^idb", "", 1)) local lowered = string.lower(args)
if args == "" or lowered == "help" then show_help() return end
if lowered == "capture" then start_capture(true) return end
if lowered == "capture all" then start_capture(false) return end
if lowered == "report" then show_report() return end
if lowered == "reload" then notify("Refreshing player name cache and reloading plugin...") do_reload() return end
local highest_stat, highest_type, highest_min, highest_max = args:match("^highest%s+(.+)%s+([^%s]+)%s+(%d+)%s+(%d+)$") if highest_stat and highest_type and highest_min and highest_max then show_highest_search_results(highest_stat, highest_type, tonumber(highest_min), tonumber(highest_max)) return end
local search_type, min_level, max_level = args:match("^search%s+(.+)%s+(%d+)%s+(%d+)$") if search_type and min_level and max_level then show_stat_search_results(search_type, tonumber(min_level), tonumber(max_level)) return end
local bloot_only = false local item_query = args if lowered:match("%s+bloot$") then bloot_only = true item_query = trim(args:gsub("%s+[Bb][Ll][Oo][Oo][Tt]$", "")) end
if item_query == "" then show_help() return end
show_grouped_name_results(item_query, bloot_only) end
function OnPluginInstall() idb.player_name = trim(GetVariable("player_name") or "") local ok = load_db() ensure_db() refresh_player_name() local did_backfill = backfill_missing_added_by()
if ok then if did_backfill then save_db(false) end
local reload_notice = trim(GetVariable("reload_notice") or "") if reload_notice ~= "" then DoAfterSpecial(0, "idb_post_reload_notice()", sendto.script) else notify("Loaded item database from " .. get_db_path()) end else save_db() notify("Created new item database at " .. get_db_path()) end end
function OnPluginSaveState() SetVariable("player_name", idb.player_name or "") save_db() end
function OnPluginDisable() SetVariable("player_name", idb.player_name or "") save_db() end
function OnPluginClose() SetVariable("player_name", idb.player_name or "") save_db() end
